source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Grinder
archetype.receipt: 1,164 games of steady volume at 50.5% — the climb is about where the games go, not how many.

entries.change: Move the offlane games to jungle

entries.receipt: 52.0% over 166 games on Zinx vs 50.5% overall

entries.change: Queue jungle instead of the usual mix
entries.receipt: 51.1% there vs 50.5% overall, 157 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

pool.name: Gadget

leanInto.name: Zinx
leanInto.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for heal/shield output: first spike lands around minute 15 (Oblivion Crown), third item by minute 28. Take Vesh: +13.5% on the damage rotation at minute 15.

plan: Queue jungle as primary. It is Willy's best role at 51.1% over 157 games (overall is 50.5%). Set support as secondary, not the other way around.
Stop queueing offlane: 41.4% over 140 games is costing real VP. When auto-filled there, play the safest comfort pick, not a learning pick.
Comfort-hero rule for the climb: Zinx. Compared with the average player on the same hero, Willy wins about 2.7 more games per 100 on it.
Willy's champion pool is 12+ heroes wide and the top three are only 47% of the games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on the top three.
The math: Willy is at 622 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. The all-time peak is 903 — Platinum-level rating has been touched once already; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward the player's own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where the player wins, not why

insights.title: Mr_Meat31 brings out Willy's best
insights.finding: Willy's record alongside Mr_Meat31 is 54% over 307 ranked games — the strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of the squad queue, make it this pair.

insights.title: Gadget is the long-term relationship
insights.finding: 223 games on Gadget at 50.6% — the field averages 50.4%. The comfort is real; the edge is roughly neutral.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 1 pentakill in real 5v5s and a longest spree of 23 (plus 1 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Willy has receipts.

insights.title: Willy punches back after losses
insights.finding: Willy wins MORE right after a loss (70%) than after a win (22%). Tilt is not the problem; complacency might be.
insights.receipt: 7/10 after losses vs 2/9 after wins, last 20 games
